title: Boston has its own archaeology team. Getting a volunteer spot is like scoring Beyoncé tickets
description: When the city of Boston’s staff archaeologists open volunteer sign-ups for one of their historic site digs, demand rivals a Beyoncé ticket drop, they joke.

title: It's big enough to swallow cities, deep enough to hide skyscrapers and inside lies an ancient, thriving 'lost world' cut off from everything above
description: Scientists have found a vibrant 'Lost City' deep in the Atlantic Ocean, thriving without sunlight. This discovery suggests life can exist in extreme conditions. Further research reveals ancient crust fragments buried deep within Earth's mantle. These findings reshape our view of our planet, highlighting vast unexplored frontiers and offering clues to life's origins and potential elsewhere.

title: Changing Nile conditions fueled the rise of a powerful ancient city
description: Long-term changes in the Nile and climate created stable land at Jebel Barkal, which made it possible for Napata to grow into a major city.

title: Stable Nile Enabled Rise Of Ancient City Of Napata
description: New research shows how natural processes shape the development of early cities. An international study, involving Wageningen University & Research

title: Will Petrol And Diesel Vehicles Be Phased Out? Nitin Gadkari Says 'Fossil Fuels Have No Future'
description: Union Minister Nitin Gadkari said vehicles running on fossil fuels like petrol and diesel have no long-term future This significant announcement highlights the governments focus on alternative fuel sources
